top_signals.title: US and Iran make ‘progress’ in talks
top_signals.summary: Tehran and Washington locked in negotiations in Switzerland over deal to settle four-month conflict
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Builds New LNG Hub as Russian Imports Surge
top_signals.summary: China is preparing  a second terminal to receive sanctioned Russian liquefied natural gas (LNG), as the country’s gas imports surge. According to an exclusive report by Reuters, the newly built Longkou LNG terminal in eastern China's Shandong province is being lined up to receive LNG from Russia’s $21-billion Arctic LNG 2 project. Operated by the state-owned pipeline monopoly PipeChina, the Longkou terminal has completed its mechanical building phase and is expected to be fully operational before October 2026, just in time to meet…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Speed or stability? Bond markets strap in for Andy Burnham coronation
top_signals.summary: City bond traders are strapping in for a “jumpy” ride as Andy Burnham looks set to cruise into Downing Street uncontested – even if a coronation helps head off the worst volatility, analysts have said. The former Manchester Mayor’s bid for the top job won a major boost today as former health secretary Wes Streeting [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: SpaceX makes bond sale days after record IPO, discloses over $100 billion cash pile
top_signals.summary: SpaceX on Monday unveiled a senior unsecured notes offering and said it held about $100.8 billion in cash.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Strategy adds $300M to USD Reserve, acquires 520 BTC
top_signals.summary: Michael Saylor’s Strategy boosted its USD Reserve to $1.4 billion and added 520 Bitcoin, funded through $335.5 million in MSTR share sales.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Tokenized RWA market cap rises 40% to top $51 billion as industry races to define equity tokenization model: Bernstein
top_signals.summary: Tokenized RWA market cap tops $51 billion as equity tokenization grows 130% and firms race to define the winning business model.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
